_risk_level_doc: Affects 8+ files including orchestrator hooks, close/commit/dev commands, and a new script. Blast radius spans the entire parallel-worker pipeline from aggregate detection through commit.

requirement.original:
Implement the consensus 5-fix plan for parallel-worker pipeline conflicts. Hard constraint: NO hardcoding anywhere. NO inline scripts (no python3 -c '...', no bash -c '...' multi-line one-liners). All logic in proper named script files.

Fix C: Change BASH_MAX_CONSECUTIVE 3→5 in pretool-orchestrator-gate.py (line 54) + update docstring (lines 6-7) + update CLAUDE.md line 46 text.
Fix A+D: Add Step 0 (parallel-aggregate auto-detect) and modify Step 1 (serialize inspectors when parallel detected) in commands/close.md.
Fix B_contract+P5: Add structured status output contract to agents/changelog-analyst.md and add retry protocol to commands/commit.md.
New script: scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py (--task-id, scan both shard patterns, write canonical aggregate, exit 0/non-zero).
requirement.clarified: Implement 5 coupled fixes to resolve parallel-worker pipeline conflicts. Expanded scope includes: commands/dev.md removal of inline-aggregate instruction (conflicts with no-inline-scripts constraint), scripts/execute-push.py stale docstring update (Fix C atomic 4-location change), NON_WORKER_LABELS parity in aggregate script, PARALLEL_AGGREGATE_WRITTEN via script stdout not env var, shard detection scoped per TASK_ID, auto_bulk_commits[] array not single sha, retry limited to recoverable grant-failure codes only.
requirement.what: 5 coupled fixes: (C) Bash streak constant 3→5 in 4 locations; (A+D) Step 0 parallel auto-detect + Step 1 conditional inspector serialization in close.md; (B_contract) structured status contract in changelog-analyst.md; (P5) retry protocol in commit.md; (new) scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py; (implicit) dev.md inline-script instruction removal
requirement.why: Parallel dev subagent runs exhaust the 3-call Bash streak; inspectors race on unfinalized artifacts; changelog-analyst fails silently; commit grants go stale with no retry path; existing dev.md instructions require inline scripts that violate the user's hard constraint

included: commands/close.md Step 0 insertion before line 159 anchor
agents/changelog-analyst.md Structured Final Status Output section
commands/dev.md removal of inline-aggregate instruction at lines 709, 747-748
excluded: Generic codebase hardcoding cleanup (only new/modified code must comply)
Full commit.md rewrite — only post-Step-6 retry protocol is in scope

Structured Final Status Output section present in changelog-analyst.md with all 4 commit_status values + auto_bulk_commits[] + failure_code
Retry protocol present in commit.md handling failed/nothing_to_commit_precommitted/nothing_to_commit states without inline scripts
scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py exists, handles both regex patterns + NON_WORKER_LABELS, writes canonical aggregate with task_id field, exits 0/non-zero
commands/dev.md no longer contains 'do NOT add a separate script' or 'orchestrator writes inline' for aggregate step
No new hardcoded absolute paths in any modified file's new/changed lines
constraints: NO inline scripts (python3 -c, bash -c multi-line one-liners)
NO hardcoded absolute paths in new/modified code

aggregate-dev-report.py must mirror pretool-aggregate-check.py classification logic exactly

scripts/execute-push.py (stale docstring reference, Fix C atomicity)
scripts/write-commit-grant.py (may need --revoke-existing-for-task option for Fix P5)

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Parallel dev subagent runs fail due to: Bash streak exhaustion at limit 3; inspectors dispatched concurrently racing on incomplete artifact state; changelog-analyst fails silently with no machine-readable status; commit grants go stale with no retry path; dev.md instruction requires inline Python/jq for aggregate writing, conflicting with the no-inline-scripts user constraint
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Five independent design gaps introduced over multiple cycles: (1) BASH_MAX_CONSECUTIVE hard-coded at 3 which is insufficient for parallel-cycle Step 0-2 overhead; (2) close.md has no detection step for parallel-worker aggregation before inspector dispatch; (3) inspector dispatch is unconditionally parallel, which races during parallel-dev cycles; (4) changelog-analyst produces only human-readable output with no machine-parseable commit_status field; (5) commit.md has no retry protocol and dev.md instructs inline aggregate writing that violates the user's script-only constraint
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — accumulated design gaps across multiple cycles
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Features were added incrementally without a unified parallel-worker contract
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: Cascade of failures: streak exhaustion blocks Step 0-2; no aggregate means inspectors operate on incomplete state; no machine status means silent failures; no retry means lost cycles; inline aggregate means violations of user's clean-code constraint
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Pre-existing design gaps surfaced when parallel-worker pipeline was first exercised
observations: Docstring at gate.py lines 6-7 reads 'Bash is capped at 3 consecutive same-name calls (4th blocked)' (inferred: Read result)

scripts/execute-push.py:9 references 'orchestrator's 3-consecutive-Bash budget exhausted by Steps 0-2' (inferred: Read result, Codex finding)
commands/close.md has no Step 0 section before line 159 (inferred: Read result)
commands/close.md line 194: 'Dispatch all three inspectors in parallel' with no conditional (inferred: Read result)

root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: incomplete (inferred only — no live orchestrator run observed)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Direct file reads confirmed all measured values. Codex consultation (gpt-5.5, xhigh) identified 2 additional affected files (commands/dev.md, scripts/execute-push.py) beyond user-specified scope.
root_cause_analysis.located_source: hooks/pretool-orchestrator-gate.py:54 (BASH_MAX_CONSECUTIVE); commands/close.md:159,194 (Step 0 insertion, Step 1 modification); agents/changelog-analyst.md (no structured section); commands/commit.md post-Step-6 (no retry); commands/dev.md:709,747-748 (inline-script instruction)

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: N/A — design gaps, not a regression

reference_source.description: hooks/pretool-aggregate-check.py canonical shard detection logic: PER_WORKER_ROLE_FIRST_RE, PER_WORKER_TASK_FIRST_RE, CANONICAL_RE, NON_WORKER_LABELS, NON_WORKER_LABEL_RE. Verified by direct Read in this session.

novelty_check.rationale: No prior attempts on this specific 5-fix plan

context.codebase_state: master branch; multiple modified files in docs/dev/ from prior cycles
context.recent_commits: 7538453 auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for master; f79fba1 auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for master

dependencies.hooks/pretool-aggregate-check.py: canonical source for shard detection regex and NON_WORKER_LABELS — must be mirrored in aggregate-dev-report.py

development_approach.strategy: Implement 5 coupled fixes in order: (1) Fix C atomic across 4 locations, (2) scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py new file, (3) commands/dev.md inline-instruction removal, (4) Fix A+D together in close.md, (5) Fix B_contract+P5 together in changelog-analyst.md+commit.md. Each group can be a separate commit. No inline scripts anywhere.
development_approach.validation_approach: Grep-based: verify constant changed, verify stale text references absent, verify new sections present in close.md/changelog-analyst.md/commit.md, verify aggregate script exits correctly with synthetic shard fixtures, verify dev.md no longer contains inline-script instruction

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex (gpt-5.5, xhigh reasoning, 140,505 tokens) identified 13 PROPOSED_FIX findings and 1 OBSERVATION_ONLY. Key expansions: Fix C scope is 4 locations (not 3) due to stale execute-push.py docstring; commands/dev.md must also be updated to remove inline-aggregate instruction; aggregate-dev-report.py must mirror NON_WORKER_LABELS + NON_WORKER_LABEL_RE; PARALLEL_AGGREGATE_WRITTEN cannot be shell env var; Fix D shard scan must be scoped per TASK_ID; auto_bulk_sha should be auto_bulk_commits[] array; retry must be scoped to recoverable grant-failure codes only; grant revocation must use named script.

findings.issue: Fix C scope only listed 3 locations; scripts/execute-push.py:9 contains stale '3-consecutive-Bash budget' reference
findings.proposed_fix: Add scripts/execute-push.py to Fix C affected files; update line 9 docstring as part of atomic Fix C change
findings.rationale: Fix C atomicity requires all text references to the old limit to be updated together

findings.issue: commands/dev.md:709 and :747-748 instruct 'do NOT add a separate script' for aggregate writing, directly conflicting with user's no-inline-scripts constraint
findings.proposed_fix: Add commands/dev.md to affected files; update Step 9 to invoke scripts/aggregate-dev-report.py --task-id $TASK_ID; remove inline-script/no-script wording
findings.rationale: User constraint is explicit; dev.md instruction must change or new script cannot be authoritative

findings.issue: aggregate-dev-report.py without NON_WORKER_LABELS/NON_WORKER_LABEL_RE would falsely classify iteration shards (dev-report-TASKID-iter2.json) as parallel workers
findings.proposed_fix: Spec must require aggregate-dev-report.py to mirror ALL classification logic from pretool-aggregate-check.py including NON_WORKER_LABELS and NON_WORKER_LABEL_RE
findings.rationale: Classification parity is required for correctness; divergence would corrupt worker count and validation

findings.issue: commands/dev.md:729-745 omits task_id top-level field; close.md:163 requires it
findings.proposed_fix: aggregate-dev-report.py must write both request_id and task_id as top-level fields
findings.rationale: Missing field causes downstream preflight failure in close.md Step 1

findings.issue: PARALLEL_AGGREGATE_WRITTEN=true as shell env var does not persist across Bash calls
findings.proposed_fix: Step 0 must capture script stdout/exit code and record result to a temp file or in-memory variable within the same close.md step; Step 1 reads that result
findings.rationale: Shell env vars are ephemeral across tool calls; result must be captured via a mechanism that persists within the workflow

findings.issue: Fix D 'shard scan finds 2+ shards' could trigger serialization on unrelated cycles if scan is global
findings.proposed_fix: Shard scan in both Step 0 and Step 1 condition must be scoped to TASK_ID only
findings.rationale: Global scan would cause false-positive serialization on unrelated tasks

findings.issue: Step 1 heading 'three inspectors in parallel' needs updating to reflect conditional serialization
findings.proposed_fix: Update the Step 1 heading to remove the word 'parallel' (e.g., 'Step 1: Agent dispatch — three inspectors')
findings.rationale: Heading would be misleading after Fix D makes dispatch conditional

findings.issue: nothing_to_commit_precommitted trigger condition uses git diff HEAD~1 --name-only which checks parent diff, not the commit itself
findings.proposed_fix: Use git show --name-only --format= HEAD to get the file list of HEAD commit itself (not the diff to its parent)
findings.rationale: git diff HEAD~1 --name-only shows changes between HEAD and its parent, but we want to check which files the auto-bulk commit actually touched

findings.issue: auto_bulk_sha is ambiguous for multi-repo setups (root + nested repos)
findings.proposed_fix: Use auto_bulk_commits[] array of {repo_root, branch, sha} objects instead of singular sha
findings.rationale: dot-claude repo can have nested repos; singular sha is insufficient

findings.issue: Retry protocol retries all 'failed' statuses; real git/staging errors are not recoverable
findings.proposed_fix: changelog-analyst must emit failure_code; commit.md retry only when failure_code indicates a recoverable grant-failure (e.g., failure_code='grant_failure' or 'grant_expired')
findings.rationale: Retrying non-recoverable failures wastes cycles and can mask real errors

findings.issue: Grant revocation uses inline find/rm in commit.md retry flow, violating no-inline-scripts constraint
findings.proposed_fix: Extend scripts/write-commit-grant.py with --revoke-existing-for-task <task_id> option OR create a new named revocation helper script
findings.rationale: User's hard constraint is explicit; inline glob/rm is an inline script

findings.issue: aggregate-dev-report.py output format not specified; Step 0 cannot determine parallel_aggregate_written from exit code alone (exit 0 for both 'aggregated' and 'already existed')
findings.proposed_fix: Script should output machine-readable JSON to stdout: {status: 'ok'|'error', action: 'aggregated'|'validated'|'skipped', output_path: '...', reason: '...'} so Step 0 can set parallel_aggregate_written based on action field
findings.rationale: Exit code alone cannot distinguish 'wrote new aggregate' from 'canonical already existed'; Step 1 needs to know if a parallel cycle was detected

findings.issue: scripts/write-commit-grant.py may not currently have --revoke-existing-for-task; dev needs to check if option exists or create it
findings.proposed_fix: Spec should note that dev must either add --revoke-existing-for-task to write-commit-grant.py OR create a dedicated revocation script; both are valid; dev chooses based on write-commit-grant.py's current structure
findings.rationale: Dev needs explicit guidance on the two valid implementation paths for grant revocation

findings.issue: 'No hardcoded paths in any file' is potentially too broad (could trigger repo-wide cleanup audit)
findings.proposed_fix: OBSERVATION_ONLY — narrow AC to: new/modified logic in this cycle introduces no new hardcoded absolute paths; derive roots from env/args/project root. Pre-existing hardcoding outside this diff is out of scope.
findings.rationale: User's constraint is about new code; retroactive cleanup is out of scope per Contract B

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 13 PROPOSED_FIX findings applied: Fix C expanded to 4 locations; commands/dev.md added to affected files; NON_WORKER_LABELS parity required in aggregate script; task_id field added to aggregate schema; PARALLEL_AGGREGATE_WRITTEN mechanism changed to script stdout; Fix D shard scan scoped to TASK_ID; Step 1 heading updated; nothing_to_commit_precommitted trigger corrected to git show; auto_bulk_sha→auto_bulk_commits[]; retry limited to failure_code-based recoverable cases; grant revocation via named script; script stdout JSON output format added. OBSERVATION_ONLY finding logged only.
